name: DeckView
author: ernes
description: Shrinks cards in deck-like views (deck view, draw/discard/exhaust piles, card library, and deck card-select screens) so more fit on screen and the whole deck is easier to read at a glance; toggle with the on-screen View mini-cards button or T. Hover still pops a card to full size. Also adds an alternate flat map: the whole act compacted onto one screen as a real top-level page (press M anywhere to open/close the map; toggle the Flat map / Compress checkboxes to configure it). Choose-a-card, card-reward, unlock, shop, and card-bundle screens are left at normal size. Built and tested for Slay the Spire 2 v0.109.0.
